gt_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.Id) FROM badges AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.UserId = T2.Id WHERE T1.Name IN ('Supporter', 'Teacher') AND T2.Location = 'New York'
pred_sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.Id) 
FROM users AS T1
INNER JOIN badges AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.UserId
WHERE TRIM(T1.Location) = 'New York'
AND T2.Name IN ('Supporter', 'Teacher')
question: How many users from New York have a teacher and supporter badge?
